allow: Bash(curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/programs > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo "already running" || echo "not running")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/ai/process-request \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"message": "hello"}' | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null | head -20)

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/ai/process-request \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"request": "hello, how are you?"}' | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null | head -20)
